topic: doubling quantities with fractions and whole numbers, real-world application
latex:
Nathaniel's favorite drink is a Very Berry Punch. He wants to make two batches. Fill in the following table for how much of each ingredient he will need.

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|}
\hline
\textbf{Batches} & 1 & 2 \\
\hline
sliced strawberries (cups) & $\frac{7}{3}$ & \\
\hline
sugar (cups) & $\frac{3}{4}$ & \\
\hline
lemon (juice) & 1 & \\
\hline
pineapple juice (ounces) & 12 & \\
\hline
ginger ale (liters) & $\frac{5}{2}$ & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
answer_latex: \text{sliced strawberries: } 4\frac{2}{3}, \text{ sugar: } 1\frac{1}{2}, \text{ lemon: } 2, \text{ pineapple juice: } 24, \text{ ginger ale: } 5
